samples.name: Default
samples.description: This demo for Essential JS2 Sankey Chart control visualizes two transmissions. Impedance and admittance are the two types of rendering in the Sankey chart.

samples.name: Vertical Mode
samples.description: This demo for Essential JS2 Sankey Chart control demonstrates horizontal and vertical orientation modes of the Sankey chart.

samples.name: Print and Export
samples.description: This demo for Essential JS2 Sankey Chart control shows the printing and exporting features of the Sankey chart.
